meta.title: Aston Villa 2-1 Young Boys (27 Nov, 2025) Final Score - ESPN (UK)
meta.description: Game summary of the Aston Villa vs. Young Boys Uefa Europa League game, final score 2-1, from 27 November 2025 on ESPN (UK).

articles.headline: Are PSG suffering from a Club World Cup hangover?
articles.description: Mark Ogden discusses PSG's chances of retaining the Champions League.

images.alt: Are PSG suffering from a Club World Cup hangover?

articles.headline: Europa League draw: Aston Villa vs. Lille, Nottingham Forest vs. Midtjylland
articles.description: Aston Villa will face Lille in the last 16 of the Europa League and Nottingham Forest have been drawn against Midtjylland.

images.alt: Europa League draw: Aston Villa vs. Lille, Nottingham Forest vs. Midtjylland

articles.headline: Nottingham Forest survive Fenerbahce rally to secure last 16 spot
articles.description: Nottingham Forest survived a scare against Fenerbahce in the Europa League playoff second leg as they booked their place in the last 16 with a 4-2 aggregate win.

images.alt: Nottingham Forest survive Fenerbahce rally to secure last 16 spot

img.alt: A plastic cup is thrown at Donyell Malen of Aston Villa after he celebrated scoring his team's first goal during the UEFA Europa League 2025/26 League Phase MD5 match between Aston Villa FC and BSC Young Boys at Villa Park on November 27, 2025
img.crdt: Harry Murphy - AVFC/Aston Villa FC via Getty Images

gmStry.hdln: Fan violence mars Aston Villa win over Young Boys
gmStry.desc: Donyell Malen struck a first-half brace as Aston Villa beat Young Boys 2-1 in the Europa League amid trouble from the away support at Villa Park.

allCommentary.dtls: Match ends, Aston Villa 2, Young Boys 1.
Second Half ends, Aston Villa 2, Young Boys 1.
Corner, Aston Villa. Conceded by Saidy Janko.

keyEvents.dtls: Goal! Aston Villa 1, Young Boys 0. Donyell Malen (Aston Villa) header from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Youri Tielemans.
Goal! Aston Villa 2, Young Boys 0. Donyell Malen (Aston Villa) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Morgan Rogers.
Sandro Lauper (Young Boys) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Aston Villa. Ezri Konsa replaces Pau Torres.
